entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, speaker in founder-to-founder one-liner

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: Company/tool for evaluating candidates based on project stories rather than resumes

entities.name: Notion
entities.context: Platform where JD/hiring content is documented

entities.name: Project Stories
entities.context: Short narratives about real projects candidates have owned, used as evaluation signal

entities.name: Execution Over Polish
entities.context: Belief that how someone thinks and executes matters more than resume polish

entities.name: Signal-Based Hiring
entities.context: Focus on extracting usable signal from candidates to make faster, better decisions

entities.name: Resume Screening
entities.context: Traditional hiring method that buries teams under many resumes to find one qualified candidate

relationships.context: Uses Careerspan to avoid being buried under resumes and find qualified candidates faster
Explicitly states caring more about thinking and execution than resume polish
Values seeing how people work through project stories rather than self-written descriptions
Tool collects short stories about real projects from candidates
Stories are transformed into signal for hiring decisions
